scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node frontend/scripts/webhook-server.mjs"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run prod --prefix backend" "node frontend/scripts/webhook-server.mjs"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix backend
